name: APPlife Digital Solutions Inc
summary: PART I Nature of Operations and Going Concern APPlife Digital Solutions, Inc. (the Company or Applife) was formed March 5, 2018, in Nevada. The Companys main operating subsidiary, Sugar Auto Parts, Inc. (SAP), was formed on January 6, 2025, as a Nevada corporation. SAP is headquartered at 701 Anacapa St, Suite C, Santa Barbara, CA 93101. On April 30, 2025, SAP executed a Bill of Sale with AP4L ABC, LLC. (AP4L) to acquire substantially all of AP4Ls assets. Under the agreement, SAP purchased all i...
